### REQUEST ###

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stable correlation IDs for flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport hashlib\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_flow_id(\r\n    src_ip: str,\r\n    src_port: int,\r\n    dst_ip: str,\r\n    dst_port: int,\r\n    protocol: int,\r\n    capture_file_id: str,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable hash of 5-tuple + capture file id. Deterministic across runs.\"\"\"\r\n    canonical = f\"{src_ip}|{src_port}|{dst_ip}|{dst_port}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "54772e3e94c769285f0886d0a6c2f61c3ad1180ad759124895a6688c1927adcf",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Pydantic settings and YAML config support.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom pydantic import Field\r\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_yaml(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\r\n    \"\"\"Load YAML file into a dict. Returns {} if file does not exist or is invalid.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path.exists():\r\n        return {}\r\n    try:\r\n        with open(path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            data = yaml.safe_load(f)\r\n        return data if isinstance(data, dict) else {}\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass NetprofSettings(BaseSettings):\r\n    \"\"\"Configuration for netprof analysis.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(\r\n        env_prefix=\"NETPROF_\",\r\n        env_nested_delimiter=\"__\",\r\n        extra=\"ignore\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # Reassembly and flow limits\r\n    reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes: int = Field(\r\n        default=1_048_576,\r\n        description=\"Max bytes per flow per direction for TCP reassembly\",\r\n    )\r\n    max_active_flows: int = Field(\r\n        default=50_000,\r\n        description=\"Max number of active flows; evict when exceeded\",\r\n    )\r\n    flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = Field(\r\n        default=60.0,\r\n        description=\"Consider flow closed after this many seconds without packets\",\r\n    )\r\n    concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = Field(\r\n        default=1.0,\r\n        description=\"Time bucket size for concurrency timeline\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # Output\r\n    output_dir: Path = Field(default=Path(\"out\"), description=\"Default output directory\")\r\n\r\n    # Top-N sizes for summary\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top talkers\")\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top destinations\")\r\n    top_ports_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top ports\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_config(config_path: Path | None) -> NetprofSettings:\r\n    \"\"\"Load settings from optional YAML file and env, with defaults.\"\"\"\r\n    defaults = NetprofSettings().model_dump()\r\n    if config_path and config_path.exists():\r\n        overrides = load_yaml(config_path)\r\n        for key, value in overrides.items():\r\n            if key in defaults and value is not None:\r\n                defaults[key] = value\r\n    return NetprofSettings(**defaults)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "12876ae198aed199b70b07397e7ae272f4259a88e01a857515d242c54d5bcf7d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Report generation.\"\"\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9343392b8cc64802fe8d232f415049e627d5586d159d030043995d878ee243ff",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"CLI package.\"\"\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "115060aadbe3002c983a94ea7d4ae06252c6b20329d5b2656f14320f1ccbca9a",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Deterministic across runs.\"\"\"\r\n    canonical = f\"{src_ip}|{src_port}|{dst_ip}|{dst_port}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "54772e3e94c769285f0886d0a6c2f61c3ad1180ad759124895a6688c1927adcf", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Pydantic settings and YAML config support.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom pydantic import Field\r\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_yaml(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\r\n    \"\"\"Load YAML file into a dict. Returns {} if file does not exist or is invalid.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path.exists():\r\n        return {}\r\n    try:\r\n        with open(path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            data = yaml.safe_load(f)\r\n        return data if isinstance(data, dict) else {}\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass NetprofSettings(BaseSettings):\r\n    \"\"\"Configuration for netprof analysis.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(\r\n        env_prefix=\"NETPROF_\",\r\n        env_nested_delimiter=\"__\",\r\n        extra=\"ignore\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # Reassembly and flow limits\r\n    reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes: int = Field(\r\n        default=1_048_576,\r\n        description=\"Max bytes per flow per direction for TCP reassembly\",\r\n    )\r\n    max_active_flows: int = Field(\r\n        default=50_000,\r\n        description=\"Max number of active flows; evict when exceeded\",\r\n    )\r\n    flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = Field(\r\n        default=60.0,\r\n        description=\"Consider flow closed after this many seconds without packets\",\r\n    )\r\n    concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = Field(\r\n        default=1.0,\r\n        description=\"Time bucket size for concurrency timeline\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # Output\r\n    output_dir: Path = Field(default=Path(\"out\"), description=\"Default output directory\")\r\n\r\n    # Top-N sizes for summary\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top talkers\")\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top destinations\")\r\n    top_ports_n: int = Field(default=10, description=\"Number of top ports\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_config(config_path: Path | None) -> NetprofSettings:\r\n    \"\"\"Load settings from optional YAML file and env, with defaults.\"\"\"\r\n    defaults = NetprofSettings().model_dump()\r\n    if config_path and config_path.exists():\r\n        overrides = load_yaml(config_path)\r\n        for key, value in overrides.items():\r\n            if key in defaults and value is not None:\r\n                defaults[key] = value\r\n    return NetprofSettings(**defaults)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "12876ae198aed199b70b07397e7ae272f4259a88e01a857515d242c54d5bcf7d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Report generation.\"\"\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "9343392b8cc64802fe8d232f415049e627d5586d159d030043995d878ee243ff", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"CLI package.\"\"\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "115060aadbe3002c983a94ea7d4ae06252c6b20329d5b2656f14320f1ccbca9a", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
